### 🛡️ All 8 Workstreams

**1A – Registry:** Active Dutch B.V., KvK 30112931, Dordrecht. Multiple trade names (Biesterfeld Chemiedistributie, Brenntag Export, HCI Chemicals Benelux, Nederlandsche Benzol Maatschappij, etc.) reflect decades of acquisitions. Latest KvK publication June 26, 2025.

**2A – Ownership:** 100% subsidiary of Brenntag SE group. No controlling individual shareholder — **publicly listed DAX company** with widely distributed institutional ownership. Subject to German capital markets mandatory disclosure (WpHG ≥3% threshold).

**3A – Sanctions: ALL CLEAN**
- ✅ OFAC SDN (18,698 records) — NO HIT
- ✅ OpenSanctions (1.27M records) — NO HIT *(Thomas Reisten hit is false positive — unrelated BinckBank case)*
- ✅ UN SC — NO HIT
- ✅ FCPA Stanford — NO ENTRY for Brenntag

**4A – Adverse Media:** None found. Publicly listed company with full disclosure compliance.

**5A – Litigation:** None found. No DOJ FCPA enforcement.

**6A – PEP:** CEO Jens Birgersson (Swedish) and CFO Thomas Reisten (German) — both NOT PEPs, clean private sector careers.

**7A – Trade Risk:** Chemical distribution sector requires standard product-level export control check. No sanctioned-country exposure. Brenntag's own compliance infrastructure manages export controls group-wide.

**8A – Actions:** KvK extract for director names; product HS code verification; standard annual rescreening.
